mapper.select: SELECT PARAM_CD, PARAM_NM, PARAM_VAL FROM SYS_PARAMETER WHERE PARAM_CD = #{code}

SELECT WORK_SCHEDULE_CODE as "workScheduleCode", m.DICT_LABEL as "workScheduleName", START_DAY_TYPE as "startDayType", case when START_DAY_TYPE = '0' then '昨天' when START_DAY_TYPE = '1' then '今天' when START_DAY_TYPE = '2' then '明天' end "startDayName", TO_CHAR(START_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "startTime", TO_CHAR(START_TIME, 'HH24MI') as "startTimeHm", END_DAY_TYPE as "endDayType", case when END_DAY_TYPE = '0' then '昨天' when END_DAY_TYPE = '1' then '今天' when END_DAY_TYPE = '2' then '明天' end as "endDayName", TO_CHAR(END_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "endTime", TO_CHAR(END_TIME, 'HH24MI') as "endTimeHm" FROM m_work_schedule ssc left join M_DICT_DATA m on ssc.WORK_SCHEDULE_CODE = m.DICT_VALUE AND M.DICT_TYPE = 'WORK_SCHEDULE' ORDER BY SSC.ID
SELECT ID "massId", STORAGE_YARD_NM "massName" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD WHERE STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '3' AND PARENT_ID = #{param.} ORDER BY SORT_NUM
SELECT T2.DEPT_NO "deptNo", T1.IS_SUPERADMIN "isSuperadmin", T2.CAN_DISPATCH_DEPT "canDispatchDept" FROM SYS_USER T1, SYS_DEPT t2 WHERE T1.DEPT_ID = T2.ID AND T1.ID = #{userId}

SELECT ID, DICT_TYPE, DICT_LABEL, DICT_VALUE, SORT_NUM, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, DICT_ENG_LABEL FROM M_DICT_DATA WHERE DICT_TYPE = 'WORK_SCHEDULE' AND STATUS = '1' ORDER BY SORT_NUM
